logs.message: WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Design contains AXI ports. Reset is fixed to synchronous and active low.

WARNING: [HLS 200-885] The II Violation in module 'C_Dense_2_Pipeline_loop_for_a_Dense_2' (loop 'loop_for_a_Dense_2'): Unable to schedule bus request operation ('gmem1_load_req') on port 'gmem1' due to limited memory ports (II = 16).
